mail-domains.title: Mail Domains
mail-domains.description: List of domains that this mail server will host mail for

enable.title: Enable Inbound Relay
enable.description: Whether to automatically request an inbound mail relay

relay-sr-url.title: Relay SR URL
relay-sr-url.description: A custom URL to use for the relay SR instead of the latest stable version

enable.title: Enable Outbound Relay
enable.description: Whether to send mail via an outbound relay

oneOf.title: Automatic Outbound Relay
oneOf.description: Send mail through an automatically requested outbound relay

enable.description: Requires enabling the automatic inbound relay

oneOf.title: Customized Outbound Relay
oneOf.description: Send mail through the specified outbound relay

host.title: Host
host.description: The host name of a relay server

port.title: Port
port.description: The port of the relay server

user.title: SMTP User
user.description: Username for SMTP authentication on the custom relay. If set SASL auth is used.

password.title: SMTP Password
password.description: Password for SMTP authentication on the custom relay.

enable.title: Enable
enable.description: Enable bogofilter spam filtering on incoming mail. Adds X-Bogosity headers to all messages.

test-account.title: Predefined Test Account
test-account.description: If set, a builtin test account will be created for each domain with address testmail@<domain> and password password123

email-size-limit.title: E-mail size limit
email-size-limit.description: Maximum size of incoming and outgoing e-mails in MiB. You may also want to set the maximum attachment size in the webmail admin panel.

request-dns.title: Request Local DNS
request-dns.description: Local DNS request configuration (specific to Open Radio Station use-case)

enable.title: Enable
enable.description: Request local DNS to a core network running on the same node

sr-url.title: SR URL
sr-url.description: The software URL to use for requesting DNS entries

sr-type.title: SR Type
sr-type.description: The software type to use for requesting DNS entries
